title: doppler/bitwarden/keyring: ?field= silently ignored — document or validate
description: Scenario: user adds ?field=password to a doppler/bitwarden/keyring URI thinking field extraction will work (as it does for aws-sm, azure-kv, vault, gcp-sm). get() silently returns the full raw value. They spend time debugging why their app is parsing the entire JSON blob instead of just the password. Maintenance consequence: will generate a steady stream of user confusion / bug reports. Fix: in from_uri for each of doppler, bitwarden, keyring, check for ?field= param and return SecretError::InvalidUri('X backend does not support ?field= field extraction; omit ?field= or use a backend that supports JSON field extraction').
